bioacousticModelHelp: Bioacoustic models are automatically selected from an internal model list based on the overlap between the species geographic range (defined by a bounding box) and the current observation location. Users can also add custom models using the 'Advanced settings' section below. Models are downloaded once and cached for futher use. Currently, the only supported model format is ONNX.
confidenceHelp: Classification score or confidence level of the model, which ranges between 0 and 1. Any detection with a value below this minimum is ignored.
overlapHelp: Percentage of overlap between analysis windows within the observation sound.
customModelHelp: Add a custom model by providing all model properties following the JSON format below.
setLanguageHelp: Select a language for the extension. This configuration will be saved in cache
coordNotFound: Could not find coordinates for this observation.
fetchGBIFError: Could not fetch GBIF range for
withinGBIF: ✓ Within GBIF/iNaturalist observation area for this species
outsideGBIF: ⚠ Outside GBIF/iNaturalist observation area for this species
withinBoth: ✓ Within both GBIF and iNaturalist observation areas
outsideBoth: ⚠ Outside both GBIF and iNaturalist observation areas
noDetection: None of detected species found within GBIF/iNaturalist at this location
endOfAnalysis: End of Analysis for this sound.
cacheNotFound: Cache not found or already empty.
formatNotSupported: format is not supported. Only ONNX models are supported in the current version.
